goal: Fix ConvertUnits to handle decimal precision correctly
expected_behavior: Unit conversions should use correct conversion factors with decimal precision
hints: KgToPounds: use the exact factor 2.20462 — Return kg * 2.20462
CelsiusToFahrenheit: ObjectScript is strictly left-to-right with no precedence — 9/5 in isolation = 1.8 (float), but write it as 1.8 to be explicit: Return (celsius * 1.8) + 32
General rule: always parenthesize mixed arithmetic expressions in ObjectScript
Integer division uses backslash: n \ 3. Regular division n/3 produces a float.
